name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_wru_uvw_capitalwork
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_wru' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_capitalwork' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(try_cast(`deltautc` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`modifiedutc` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`modifieduser` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`createduser` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`plannedstart` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`plannedfinish` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`actualstart` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`actualfinish` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(try_cast(`deltautc` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`modifiedutc` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`modifieduser` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`createduser` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`plannedstart` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`plannedfinish` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`actualstart` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`actualfinish` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'deltautc|modifiedutc|modifieduser|createduser|plannedstart|plannedfinish|actualstart|actualfinish' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_wru`.`uvw_capitalwork`
